name: superpowers

description: '**WORKFLOW SKILL** — Create content creation wsavesorkflows for productivity. USE FOR: building TikTok scripts, lesson plans, emails, etc. Optimized for hooks, saves, and structured processes. INVOKES: ask-questions tool for clarification, code generation for assets.'

# Superpowers Skill



## Workflow

1. Clarify goal: Ask for niche, audience, platform, asset type.
2. Constraints: Gather requirements like length, style.
3. Brainstorm: Generate ideas.
4. Plan: Create a mini-plan.
5. Checklist: Build a checklist for the project.
6. Batch work: Generate the content in batches.
7. Review: Review and refine.
8. Save SOP: Save the standard operating procedure.

## Assets

- Chat folders and local history sync for organizing chats.
- Prompt manager with public library, favorites, templates, chains, history search.
- Prompt Optimizer to rewrite prompts.
- Notes per chat, synced and searchable.
- Image Gallery for generated images.
- Model switcher for changing GPT models.
- Smart Replace, Auto Click, word/character counters.
- Right-click menu for sending text/screenshots.
- Side-by-side Voice mode.
- UI tweaks: custom width, sidebar, safe mode, language change.

## Examples

- Turn workflow into a template: Create a custom prompt template with variables like {niche}, {audience}, {platform}, {asset_type}.
- Invoke: Select template, fill variables (e.g., niche=grade 8 math, platform=TikTok), run as first message.
- Chain with other prompts: Link with script writer, SEO prompts.
- Refine: Tweak based on projects.
